decisions.summary: Added killAllReviewSessions() to kill all review-related tmux sessions (coordinators, canonical reviewers, legacy reviewers) — called from pan down to prevent stale sessions surviving dashboard restart.

Enhanced dispatchParallelReview idempotency guard with isCoordinatorAliveAsync() that checks #{pane_pid} process existence via kill -0. Catches zombies where pane_dead=0 but underlying bash process has exited.
Wired killAllReviewSessions into pan down command in src/cli/index.ts, positioned after dashboard stop and before Traefik stop.

Fixed dispatchParallelReview idempotency guard test 'skips dispatch when coordinator pane and process are both alive' by mocking process.kill — the test was failing because process.kill(1, 0) throws EPERM in restricted test environments.

Added source-level regression tests for pan down integration: verifies src/cli/index.ts imports killAllReviewSessions, calls it in the down handler, and positions it after dashboard stop and before Traefik stop.

hazards.summary: process.kill(pid, 0) is sync but extremely fast (single syscall). Used only in review-agent code, not dashboard server routes.
hazards.mitigation: Acceptable per CLAUDE.md: CLI-side sync calls are fine.

hazards.summary: Tests using process.kill(0) for PID existence checks are environment-dependent — may fail in sandboxed containers.
hazards.mitigation: Mock process.kill in tests that assert alive/zombie coordinator behavior.

resumePoint.description: All three beads are complete. Implementation done: killAllReviewSessions added, idempotency guard enhanced, pan down wired, tests added and passing. Next step: run pan done PAN-931 to signal completion.

sessionHistory.note: Completed bead workspace-etvu: added killAllReviewSessions function and enhanced idempotency guard in review-agent.ts. All 81 existing tests pass.
Completed bead workspace-sfog: wired killAllReviewSessions into pan down command in src/cli/index.ts.

Completed bead workspace-yzs6: fixed failing idempotency guard test (mocked process.kill), added 3 source-level regression tests for pan down integration. All 92 review-agent tests pass. Full suite has 4 pre-existing failures in unrelated files.
